skills.name: Pomodoro Timer
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: ADHD-friendly focus timer with breaks. Integrates with /task and /focus for seamless deep work sessions.

skills.name: Async Standup
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Collect team updates asynchronously throughout the day. Synthesize into a standup report on demand.

skills.name: Contract Generator
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Generate service contracts and NDAs from templates. Adapts to your business type, currency, and legal jurisdiction.

skills.name: Pitch Deck Builder
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Build investor and client pitch decks. Structure your story, value prop, and ask. Export as markdown or slides outline.

skills.name: AI Meal Planner
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Weekly meal plans based on your dietary restrictions, budget, cooking level, and goals. Generates shopping lists.

skills.name: Guided Meditation
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Text-based guided meditation and breathing exercises. 5-15 minute sessions adapted to your stress level.

skills.name: Spaced Repetition
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Create and review flashcards with spaced repetition algorithm. Import from notes or generate from any topic.

skills.name: Exam Preparation
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Structured exam preparation with practice questions, weak area identification, and study schedule generation.

skills.name: CRM Lite
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Lightweight CRM for freelancers. Track contacts, deals, follow-ups. Integrates with /network and /pipeline.

skills.name: Sprint Retrospective
skills.author: zmrlk
skills.description: Guided sprint retrospective: what went well, what didn't, what to change. Generates action items.
